analysis.architecture_language: Contemporary gallery hall with clean architectural lines.
analysis.wall_language: matte off-white or mineral white wall, subtle texture, no signage
analysis.floor_language: polished concrete, pale wood, or quiet stone floor
analysis.ceiling_language: simple ceiling plane with discreet gallery lighting
analysis.lighting: Soft, diffused gallery daylight from an unseen high source, creating gentle ambient light, supplemented by cool-toned, focused track lighting subtly accentuating the artwork's surface texture and depth; soft_gallery_daylight_or_controlled_track_light
materials: Matte off-white mineral wall with subtle texture
clean contemporary gallery planes, controlled proportions, calm openings
matte off-white or mineral white wall, subtle texture, no signage
polished concrete, pale wood, or quiet stone floor
simple ceiling plane with discreet gallery lighting
mood: Serene, architectural, and contemplative, with an emphasis on spatial depth and understated elegance. The cool, calm environment allows the artwork's vibrant colors to resonate; Minimal Gallery Wall Centered: calm contemporary gallery, clean air, restrained commercial clarity Placement mode: wall_hanging. Use a quiet commercially usable gallery wall. Keep the artwork primary and physically plausible. Allow only minimal architecture around the artwork.

The artwork's abstract composition, with its interplay of strong geometric forms and organic lines, finds a perfect counterpart in the clean, unornamented architecture of a minimalist gallery. The cool, neutral palette of the environment allows the deep blues, rich browns, and vibrant red/yellow accents of the artwork to truly sing, while the low camera angle mirrors the artwork's internal spatial tension and elevates its perceived gravitas.
camera_potential: soft editorial left-oblique physical view, 15–20 degrees, clearly non-frontal
A soft editorial left-oblique room camera: the artwork plane, wall plane, floor lines, furniture perspective, and architectural vanishing direction must share one coherent perspective.
negative_risks: no people, no animals, no poster, no flat print, no distortion, no fisheye, no incorrect scale, no cropped artwork, no altered artwork, no mirrored artwork, no generic vintage room, no winter default unless seasonally intended, no monumental atrium, no heroic scale, no architectural spectacle, no busy gallery, no crowd, no art fair signage, no pet, no animal, no generic neutral interior, no showroom, no unrelated gallery; no monumental atrium; no heroic scale; no architectural spectacle; no busy gallery; no crowd; no art fair signage; no pet; no animal; no crowds; no labels; no pets; no decorative clutter; no artwork substitution; artwork_must_remain_primary; commercially_usable_scale; no_monumental_atrium; no_heroic_scale; no_architectural_spectacle; no_pets; no_crowds; no_decorative_clutter; no_artwork_substitution; artwork remains the primary visual subject; context supports the artwork, never replaces it; no scale distortion; no decorative dominance

style_details.artwork_analysis_summary: A dance of deep blues and earthy ochres, structured by geometric precision and organic flow. An abstract exploration of layered forms and chromatic depth, evoking landscapes of mind and matter. Stratified Horizon A dance of deep blues and earthy ochres, structured by geometric precision and organic flow. An abstract exploration of layered forms and chromatic depth, evoking landscapes of mind and matter. Urban Blueprint Dynamic lines and bold color fields map out a compelling internal architecture. This piece reinterprets the essence of a cityscape through a compelling interplay of shape and vibrant contrast. Chromatic Depths An intricate composition where rich blues and warm browns meet sharp accents of red and yellow. A visually dense and contemplative work, revealing hidden geometries and an atmospheric sense of place.
